# SaaS Assignment Source Evidence

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/saasassignment -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to runtime-scheduling.md](../runtime-scheduling.md)

Executable SSOT: [`saas-assignment-source.riido.json`](saas-assignment-source.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `saas-assignment-source-evidence`.

Prove the daemon-side SaaS assignment source/reporter contract without claiming control-plane or client presentation ownership.

## Implemented Facts

| Fact | Status | Summary | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| shared assignment contract | `implemented` | SaaS adapter consumes assignment DTO/state/event constants from riido-contracts. | `shared-contract-test`, `shared-contract-import` |
| poll start active cancel mapping | `implemented` | Poll start/active become TaskRequest; poll cancel is delivered to the local cancellation watcher. | `poll-action-switch`, `poll-cancel-branch` |
| long poll wait contract | `implemented` | PollRequest.wait_ms defaults to 30 seconds and extends the HTTP timeout. | `long-poll-default`, `poll-wait-ms`, `long-poll-wait-test` |
| candidate backpressure | `implemented` | Multiple candidate agents are short-polled first and only one candidate receives the long poll. | `static-candidate-long-poll-test`, `dynamic-candidate-long-poll-test` |
| runtime wave fairness | `implemented` | A runtime claim wave does not let an earlier runtime long-poll block later runtimes; only the final runtime receives the long-poll hint. | `claim-long-poll-context`, `runtime-wave-long-poll-test`, `dynamic-long-poll-disabled-test` |
| stale binding recovery | `implemented` | A stale dynamic binding poll rejection invalidates the binding cache and does not abort other live candidates in the same claim wave. | `stale-binding-sentinel`, `stale-binding-cache-test`, `stale-binding-live-candidate-test` |
| heartbeat stale cancellation | `implemented` | Daemon forwards active assignment ids and cancels local watchers when heartbeat response omits a requested assignment. | `heartbeat-default`, `heartbeat-post`, `stale-heartbeat-cancel-test` |
| events endpoint owns progress and lifecycle reports | `implemented` | Progress, lifecycle, running, session pin, terminal result, and coalesced text body reports are posted to /events. | `event-post-path`, `event-retry-test`, `assignment-running-test`, `partial-body-test` |
| auth forwarding | `implemented` | Device credentials and bearer token, when configured, are attached to SaaS HTTP requests. | `device-secret-auth`, `bearer-auth-test` |
| dynamic runtime bindings | `implemented` | Dynamic /v1/daemon/agent-bindings are cached and used to map runtime/provider scope to agent ids. | `agent-bindings-path`, `binding-cache-ttl`, `dynamic-binding-claim-test` |

## Boundaries

| Boundary | Owner | Summary |
| --- | --- | --- |
| control-plane stale deadline | riido-control-plane | The 20-second stale projection is upstream; daemon evidence only proves it honors omitted heartbeat refreshes. |
| task-thread presentation | riido-client/control-plane read model | Figma task-thread copy, cold collection rows, and busy/deleted agent messages are not daemon responsibilities. |
| agent authorization policy | riido-control-plane authZ | Public/private agent access policy is evaluated before daemon receives assignment snapshots. |
| private infra and stores | riido-control-plane/riido-infra | HTTP handlers, persistence, SSE fan-out, metrics, health read models, Terraform, and secrets are not daemon-owned. |

## Forbidden Surfaces

| Surface | Reason |
| --- | --- |
| `thread-progress endpoint ownership` | daemon reports progress through /events and must not claim the cold task-thread endpoint |
| `client presentation copy ownership` | client/control-plane own Figma copy and task-thread presentation |
| `private server package import` | public daemon must not import private control-plane implementation |

## Assertions

- `Implemented facts must point at local source evidence.`
- `Upstream/client boundaries must not be described as daemon-owned behavior.`
- `Reader docs must be generated from this manifest.`
- `The daemon must not claim /thread-progress ownership while source code posts to /events.`
